tasks.description: Receive cacao beans for the 75 g focused factory scope.
Roast and winnow cacao beans into Cacao Nibs - Raw Material.
expectedActions: Report production for Cacao Nibs - Raw Material

tasks.description: Produce Base - 70% Dark Chocolate from cacao nibs, sugar, and cacao butter.
successCriteria: Base stock is received to production location
All issue lines use mass UOMs

tasks.description: Produce Base - Milk Chocolate for the retained 75 g milk variants.
expectedActions: Issue cacao nibs, sugar, butter, powdered milk

tasks.description: Produce Base - Coconut Milk Chocolate for dark coconut variants.
expectedActions: Issue cacao nibs, sugar, butter, coconut milk powder
successCriteria: Coconut base is available for downstream bars

tasks.description: Produce Base - Pomelo for the Hill Coffee and Pomelo 75 g bar.
expectedActions: Issue cacao nibs, sugar, coffee beans
successCriteria: Base - Pomelo is created exactly once

tasks.description: Produce Base - Sugar Free for the Paleo Robbie 75 g bars.
expectedActions: Issue cacao nibs and powdered milk
successCriteria: Sugar-free base is stocked by weight

tasks.description: Temper Apple Pie Milk Chocolate - Halloween (75g) - FLOW WRAP as a discrete intermediate.
itemsInvolved: Apple Pie Milk Chocolate - Halloween (75g) - FLOW WRAP
successCriteria: Base chocolate issue remains in g

tasks.description: Wrap Durian Milk Chocolate (75g) into sellable finished goods.
successCriteria: Finished bar is stocked as piece

tasks.description: Verify piece-count inventory for Masala Chai Milk Chocolate (75g).
successCriteria: Finished item UOM is piece only

tasks.description: Pick Simply Cacao Plus Milk - Paleo Robbie (75g) for an outbound order.
itemsInvolved: Simply Cacao Plus Milk - Paleo Robbie (75g)
successCriteria: Picked quantity is counted by piece

tasks.description: Pack and ship Tom Yum Dark Chocolate (75g) to a customer.
Inspect minimal-stock shortage behavior after one full unit of every retained 75 g SKU is planned.
expectedActions: Plan one run per 75 g SKU
successCriteria: Every retained 75 g SKU is manufacturable exactly once
No unrelated leaf materials are stocked

tasks.description: Inspect base-stock normal production behavior across repeated 75 g runs.
expectedActions: Plan five runs per retained SKU

tasks.description: Verify only BOM-derived 75 g finished bars remain in scope.
successCriteria: No 8 g, 20 g, 1 kg, powder, nib pack, gift box, or sauce outputs remain as finished goods
